page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance operates with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, meaning hyperthreading is not active, providing dedicated execution resources per vCPU.

The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include any local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, facilitating standard data transfer rates for multi-node deployments.

With a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is positioned in the general-purpose hardware class. The lack of hyperthreading ensures predictable compute performance per vCPU, though it limits concurrent thread density compared to multi-threaded configurations. The absence of local storage and GPU accelerators makes it highly reliant on external cloud storage and unsuitable for hardware-accelerated workloads. It is best suited for general-purpose workloads, including application servers, web serving, and mid-sized databases that require consistent CPU performance without local disk dependencies.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.12xlarge is a general-purpose server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor operating at 2.7 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance offers dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration and local disks, this instance is designed for workloads requiring predictable compute performance and moderate memory capacity, such as application hosting, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 192 GB of RAM, and 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth without local storage or GPU accelerators.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose instance featuring forty-eight single-threaded Intel Xeon cores and balanced memory allocation for predictable compute workloads.

192.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
